critical_code_review_comments: Market page has intentional 6s fetch timeout + 3s ignition phase - total ~9-10s before full content renders. This is by design but could impact perceived performance.
Backend returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthenticated requests - functionally correct but inconsistent with HTTP standards
